functions.title: Guide Book #75
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #75§r
§lCursed Rat§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Cursed, Magical, Small mammal, Animal, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All underground, Plains, Snowy Plains, Forest, Flower Forest,

Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Pale Oak, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Jungle, Swamp, Mangrove Swamp, Savanna, Corrupted Forest surfaces.
•§lSummon by§r: Rat Curserer
•§lHealth§r: 16
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air

•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Rat, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Any mob wielding the Curserer Staff.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3
•Can be uncursed using

a §lCursed Eye§r in your mainhand and §lBook of Curses§r in your offhand.
•Cursed Rat may pick up random items.
•Cursed Rat can destroy crops.

§lGiant Rat§r §o(Uncursed Rat)§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Small mammal, Animal.
•§lSpawns by§r: Uncursing the Cursed Rat.
•§lHealth§r: 16 §o(Wild)§r | 24 §o(Tamed)§r

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.28
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Most of the food.
•§lHealed by§r: Most of the food.
•§lTamed by§r: Cheese Bread
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Rat, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's

attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3
•Wild Giant Rat can randomly sit.
•Tamed Giant Rat can be sat down.
•Wild Giant Rat can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•Wild Giant Rat can destroy crops.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
